headline: A work found the flaw in the instrument it was built from.

participants.local_status: correction applied; register revised; obligations active
transport only; not an authoring party to either side's assertions

non_participants.note: Not a participant in this encounter. Zero references in either direction between Ulysses and Meridian; Ulysses↔Ensemble is structural permission only ("The Atelier … usable with attribution"), never exercised (docs/ENCOUNTER-INVENTORY.md, 'Documented silences'). Rendered here as documented non-relation, not failure or inferred refusal (spec 03 §8.1); no default Ulysses lens applied (spec 07 §11).

events.quote: a caveat stated once here must not go unstated twice downstream
events.attribution: standing self-binding commitment of the source, session 22

events.quote: Live status travels; load-bearing caveats survive re-voicing; corrections flow upstream, never silently sideways
events.attribution: the work's own admission contract, session 07

events.quote: Although the panel did not rely on AI-detection evidence, it credited graders' ability to identify AI-written work, pointed to irrelevant sources that raised concerns about AI use, and cited Yang's lack of citations, repeated excuses, and inconsistent testimony.
events.attribution: reported by the work into the source archive, delivered by the conductor

events.quote: A work about machine judgment may not borrow stakes the record does not attribute to the machine
events.attribution: rationale stated in the work, session 08

events.quote: Arrived as the collective's first downstream correction report
events.attribution: register revised after a renewed verification pass, session 33

events.quote: THE PREMIERE — Native Speaker through the full gate (Verifier PASS WITH FINDINGS, minors fixed + delta-checked; Dramaturg DELIVERS; Kritiker PREMIERE STANDS, critique published verbatim, five on the record) and GRADUATED to works/2026-07-13-native-speaker

obligations.label: live-status-travels — active
obligations.clause_text: Live status travels with every derived operation, at equal prominence to the derived headline — not a status frozen at the moment of translation.

obligations.label: caveat-preservation — active
obligations.clause_text: A re-voiced or re-cooked piece must preserve the caveat its source work's own README names as load-bearing — re-voicing compresses, and compression is where a load-bearing caveat is dropped for pace, not from bad intent.

divergence.leftQuote: a detector-in-the-accusation observation, not court-attributed detector harm
divergence.rightQuote: the University of Minnesota expulsion case as detector-attributed harm on the work's verdict card
